title: execute_command
description: Execute a command on the Flipper Zero device. All file operations, device queries, hardware control, and artifact pushes go through this interface. Mirrors com.vesper.flipper.domain.model.ExecuteCommand.

action.description: The action to perform on the Flipper Zero

args.description: Arguments for the action (varies by action type). Unused fields may be omitted.

command.description: Free-form command string. For execute_cli: the CLI command. For search_faphub/github_search/search_resources: the query. For install_faphub_app: the app id or name. For forge_payload: fallback natural-language prompt. For launch_app: fallback app name. For run_runbook: fallback runbook id. For browse_repo: fallback repo id.

path.description: File or directory path on Flipper (e.g., /ext/subghz/garage.sub). Also the source path for move/copy/rename, target path for push_artifact/download_resource, and signal file for subghz_transmit/ir_transmit/nfc_emulate/rfid_emulate/ibutton_emulate/badusb_execute.

content.description: Content to write to file (for write_file action). Also used as a fallback for execute_cli commands and install_faphub_app direct download URL.

recursive.description: Whether to delete recursively (for delete action)

artifact_type.description: Type of artifact being pushed (for push_artifact action)

payload_type.description: Type of payload to generate (for forge_payload action)

app_args.description: Arguments passed to the launched app; also used as the ble_spam mode string

frequency.description: Frequency in Hz for SubGHz operations

signal_name.description: Named signal for IR transmit operations

enabled.description: On/off state (for vibro_control action; defaults to true)

sub_path.description: Sub-path within a browsed repo (for browse_repo action)

download_url.description: Direct URL of resource to download (for download_resource, or direct .fap URL for install_faphub_app)

search_scope.description: GitHub search scope, e.g. "code" or "repositories" (for github_search action; defaults to "code")

photo_prompt.description: Prompt describing what to capture (for request_photo action)

justification.description: Explanation of why this action is being taken

expected_effect.description: What you expect this action to accomplish

examples.justification: User wants to see their SubGHz captures
examples.expected_effect: Return a list of .sub files in the SubGHz directory

examples.justification: User wants to inspect the garage remote configuration
examples.expected_effect: Return the contents of the garage.sub file

args.content:
Filetype: Flipper SubGhz Key File
Version: 1
Frequency: 315000000
...

examples.justification: User wants to change the frequency from 390MHz to 315MHz
examples.expected_effect: Update the garage.sub file with the new frequency

examples.justification: User wants to transmit the garage signal
examples.expected_effect: Transmit the SubGHz signal stored in garage.sub

examples.justification: User wants detailed system information from the Flipper
examples.expected_effect: Return system info output from the Flipper CLI

examples.justification: User wants to open the SubGHz app on the Flipper
examples.expected_effect: Launch the Sub-GHz application on the Flipper Zero

examples.justification: User wants visual feedback from the Flipper
examples.expected_effect: Turn on the green LED on the Flipper Zero

examples.justification: User wants haptic feedback
examples.expected_effect: Turn on the vibration motor

examples.justification: User is looking for a WiFi scanning app
examples.expected_effect: Return matching applications from the FapHub catalog

examples.justification: User wants to install the selected FapHub app
examples.expected_effect: Install the WiFi Marauder .fap onto the Flipper

examples.justification: User wants a generated BadUSB payload
examples.expected_effect: Return a forged BadUSB script matching the spec

examples.justification: User is browsing community SubGHz resources
examples.expected_effect: Return matching resource repositories

examples.justification: User wants to inspect a specific resource repo
examples.expected_effect: List contents at the given sub-path within the repo

examples.justification: User wants to download a signal file
examples.expected_effect: Download the resource to the given Flipper path

examples.justification: User wants GitHub code search results
examples.expected_effect: Return matching GitHub code results

examples.justification: User wants to browse vault contents
examples.expected_effect: Return filtered vault entries

examples.justification: User wants to run a pre-defined recon routine
examples.expected_effect: Execute the referenced runbook

examples.justification: User wants to run a BLE spam mode
examples.expected_effect: Launch BLE spam with the given mode

examples.justification: User wants a picture taken via smartglasses
examples.expected_effect: Trigger a photo capture at the agent layer

examples.justification: User wants to check device status
examples.expected_effect: Return battery level, firmware version, and hardware info
